title: olearia exilis
intro: Olearia exilis, also known as the dwarf tree daisy or New Zealand daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Olearia exilis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Olearia exilis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
